message:
tests(e2e): improve tmux test robustness and cleanup

Fixes for the interactive tmux smoke test (e2e_interactive_smoke_tmux):

TmuxInstance::kill_server:
- Redirect stdout/stderr to null to avoid test output pollution
- Prevents "no server running" messages from cluttering test logs

Pane capture safety:
- Check session_exists() before attempting to capture final pane state
- Handle case where tmux session ends before capture can occur
- Provide fallback message when session ended before capture

Code cleanup:
- Remove unused `mut` from harness variable in theme path discovery test
- Fixes compiler warning about unnecessary mutability

These changes make the tmux E2E tests more reliable in edge cases where
the session terminates quickly or tmux cleanup races with capture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
